overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage depicting a first-person exploration through indoor corridors and neon-lit urban streets. The player moves from an interior building space with vending machines through stairwells into a foggy outdoor night market filled with holographic advertisements and food stalls.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor corridor with Insta-Food vending machines

events.description: transitioning from blue corridor lighting to areas with pink neon illuminated windows
discovering a deceased body lying on the corridor floor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the indoor corridor past vending machines and debris

notable_agents.action: deceased civilian lying motionless on the floor near the wall

entered.detail: twin red vending machines with 'Insta-Food' branding and glowing food advertisements
corridor windows with pink neon lighting behind metal mesh security covering
scattered trash and cardboard boxes littering the concrete floor

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dimly lit indoor corridor featuring prominent red Insta-Food vending machines. As the camera moves forward, the lighting shifts to reveal pink neon-lit mesh windows along the right wall. A deceased body lies on the floor to the left, adding a grim element to the cyberpunk environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell and lower level corridors

events.description: beginning descent down concrete stairs with metal railings
approaching and exiting through brightly lit doorway to outdoor urban area

agents.ego_description: walking down the concrete stairwell through industrial corridors toward the street exit

entered.detail: descending concrete stairs with worn steps and industrial metal railings
brightly lit exit doorway with glowing light spilling into the corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera descends a concrete stairwell with industrial metal railings and fluorescent lighting, leaving the upper corridor behind. The segment ends as the player approaches a brightly lit exit doorway leading to the outdoor urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk plaza with massive holographic advertisements

events.description: exiting building into open urban street with towering billboards
looking up at towering buildings and holographic advertisements above

agents.ego_description: walking through the neon-lit plaza and looking up at the towering advertisements and buildings

notable_agents.action: character with green hair and colorful outfit standing in the street

entered.detail: massive holographic billboard displaying 'WET DREAM' with blue crystalline imagery
tall vertical billboard showing 'SMOOTH DESIRE' with stylized face imagery
tall industrial buildings with neon signage and metal scaffolding structures

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the building, the scene opens into a vast cyberpunk plaza illuminated by massive holographic billboards for 'WET DREAM' and 'SMOOTH DESIRE.' The camera pans up to admire the towering buildings before continuing through the sparse crowd, passing a character with distinctive green hair.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy night market with food stalls and seating

events.description: entering foggy market area with reduced visibility and atmospheric haze
pausing to examine food stall with animated digital advertising screens

agents.ego_description: walking through the foggy market observing vendors and customers at seating areas

notable_agents.action: customer sitting at market counter eating food
vendor standing behind food stall serving customers

entered.detail: wooden market stalls with canopies selling various food items
red paper lanterns with Japanese characters hanging from stall roofs
small digital screens displaying animated food advertisements on stall counters

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a foggy night market filled with food stalls, red Japanese paper lanterns, and digital advertising screens. The atmosphere is hazy with moderate crowds of customers sitting at counters and vendors attending their stalls, creating a lively yet moody cyberpunk street scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a grim, dimly lit interior corridor into a vibrant, neon-soaked cyberpunk night market. It begins by moving past red Insta-Food vending machines and pink neon-lit mesh windows, passing a deceased body on the floor before descending a concrete industrial stairwell. As the camera reaches the bottom, the scene opens through a brightly lit doorway into a vast plaza dominated by towering buildings and massive holographic billboards for Wet Dream and Smooth Desire. The camera then pans across a sparse crowd and a character with green hair, shifting from the open plaza into a hazy, foggy street. Finally, the movement leads through a lively night market filled with red Japanese paper lanterns, digital screens, and vendors attending to customers at food stalls.
